articles.title: Personal decision for Starmer on whether to fight leadership contest, minister says
articles.description: Culture Secretary Lisa Nandy tells the BBC that the prime minister has "shown before that he's up for a fight" and she "wouldn't write [him] off".

articles.title: 'All I thought about was running for my life': Footballer recalls train stabbing attack
articles.description: Footballer Jonathan Gjoshe was among the 11 passengers seriously injured in a knife attack on a train as it travelled through Cambridgeshire last November.

articles.title: Am I part of the luckiest generation in history?

articles.title: Trump warns 'clock is ticking' for Iran as peace progress stalls
articles.description: Iranian media reports the US has not made concrete concessions in response to Tehran's latest proposals.
